case_title: JEFF SIGNORELLO VS. VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNORELLO, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
